title: Dodonaea barklyana
intro: Dodonaea barklyana, also known as the 'Ngaio', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to New Zealand. The health benefits of Dodonaea barklyana include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in soothing skin irritations and supporting immune function.
